Executive Track Record · 20+ Years

Delivered At Major Scale.

Before founding Drievu, our leadership team spent two decades delivering complex electronic security and building systems across national transit grids, financial centers, and commercial real estate.

Proven Engineering Heritage.

Filter our leadership team’s historical delivery record by property environment.

Commercial Office
London Borough of Hounslow

Staines Road Commercial Campus

Hardware & System Scope320+ Flush-Mounted Cameras & Keyless Access

Delivered a completely hidden wiring architecture across a multi-story commercial workspace. Integrated mobile smartphone access gates and local 4K surveillance without disrupting tenant daily operations.

Public Infrastructure
Regional UK Transit Grid

National Metro & Rail Transit Network

Hardware & System Scope1,200+ Networked CCTV Nodes & Fiber Backbones

Engineered high-density video surveillance adhering strictly to British Standard BS EN 62676. Configured zero-latency local control rooms with automated failover recording and zero cloud storage fees.

BS EN Compliant DeliveryScoping Details Verified
Financial & Real Estate
Global Financial District

GIFT City International Financial Tower

Hardware & System ScopeTurnkey Perimeter Security & Speed Gates

Executed an end-to-end electronic security blueprint for a landmark financial hub. Deployed optical speed turnstiles, encrypted elevator destination control, and multi-zone intrusion alarms.

BS EN Compliant DeliveryScoping Details Verified
Residential Block
Central London

Heritage Residential Block & Gardens

Hardware & System Scope64 Weather-Proof Cameras & Video Intercoms

Upgraded legacy analogue wiring to modern high-definition IP surveillance without altering exterior heritage masonry. Residents gained secure smartphone gate entry and crystal-clear visitor verification.

BS EN Compliant DeliveryScoping Details Verified
Logistics & Industrial
West Midlands Freight Hub

Midlands Logistics & Distribution Yard

Hardware & System ScopeThermal Perimeter Fence & Automated Gate Barriers

Eliminated after-hours theft using autonomous thermal detection cameras linked to high-output public announcement speakers. System triggers instant alerts to local security guards with zero false alarms.

Public Infrastructure
Metropolitan Sports Hub

International Civic Arena & Event Grid

Hardware & System ScopeHigh-Capacity Crowd Surveillance & Audio Intercoms

Designed an integrated safety control matrix capable of monitoring 50,000+ visitors. Supported by our priority 4-hour emergency engineering response SLA to guarantee zero system downtime during major events.
